Class TUIUtils

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.TUI.TUIUtils
public class TUIUtils extends Object
Utility class for common TUI operations: screen management, input helpers, error formatting, and color constants.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BLUE
    ANSI bold-blue color sequence.
    static final String

    ANSI bold-green color sequence.

    static final String
    RED
    ANSI bold-red color sequence.
    static final String
    RESET
    ANSI reset sequence — restores the default terminal color.
    static final String
    YELLOW
    ANSI bold-yellow color sequence.

  • Constructor Details

    • TUIUtils

      public TUIUtils(Scanner scanner)
      Creates a new TUIUtils instance.
      Parameters:
      scanner - the shared Scanner for user input.

  • Method Details

    • clearScreen

      public void clearScreen()
      Clears the terminal screen.

    • pauseAndClear

      public void pauseAndClear()
      Waits for the user to press ENTER, then clears the screen.

    • extractCleanError

      public String extractCleanError(Exception e)
      Extracts a human-readable message from an exception.
      Parameters:
      e - the exception to parse.
      Returns:
      the cleaned error message.

    • numberOfPlayer

      public int numberOfPlayer()
      Asks the user to enter the number of players (2-5).
      Returns:
      the validated number of players.

    • bindTotemColor

      public COLOR bindTotemColor()
      Asks the user to choose a totem color.
      Returns:
      the chosen COLOR enum value.

    • getAnsiColor

      public String getAnsiColor(COLOR color)
      Returns the ANSI escape sequence corresponding to the given totem color. If the color is null, the reset code is returned.
      Parameters:
      color - the player's totem color, or null.
      Returns:
      the ANSI sequence for coloring terminal text.
